rationale: Acting on Review 1 fixes four real proof-quality defects visible in the diff (redundant/uncommented `change` at comul_includeRight:170 that includeRight_apply could have avoided; defeq-only `let u` + coercion in antipode_comp:52; non-obvious `ext; induction; simp` hiding bialgebra-hom equalities at map_id:98 and map_comp:120), all of which would be material to a maintainer. Review 2 only flags a subset of one of those plus an unverified `simpa` fragility suggestion; its fixes leave the other brittleness untouched.
